languages.text: "Что-то, что могли понять лишь мы оба. Позвольте мне оставить эту загадку без ответа. Я хочу, чтобы у меня было воспоминание о нем, которое принадлежит только мне".
"Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."
languages.original_text: "Что-то, что могли понять лишь мы оба. Позвольте мне оставить эту загадку без ответа. Я хочу, чтобы у меня было воспоминание о нем, которое принадлежит только мне".

traits.locale_text: "Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."
"Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."
"Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."

languages.text: «Algo que solo entendemos nosotros dos. Concédame que este misterio quede sin resolver. Deseo tener un recuerdo suyo que me pertenezca solo a mí».
languages.original_text: "Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."

traits.locale_text: «Algo que solo entendemos nosotros dos. Concédame que este misterio quede sin resolver. Deseo tener un recuerdo suyo que me pertenezca solo a mí».

languages.text: “那是只有我们二人才懂的话。请允许我保留这个秘密吧。我想拥有一份只属于我自己的，关于他的回忆。”
languages.original_text: "Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."

traits.locale_text: “那是只有我们二人才懂的话。请允许我保留这个秘密吧。我想拥有一份只属于我自己的，关于他的回忆。”

languages.text: « Quelque chose que nous sommes les seuls à pouvoir comprendre. Permettez-moi de laisser ce mystère entier. J'aimerais avoir un souvenir de lui qui n'appartienne qu'à moi. »
languages.original_text: "Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."

traits.locale_text: « Quelque chose que nous sommes les seuls à pouvoir comprendre. Permettez-moi de laisser ce mystère entier. J'aimerais avoir un souvenir de lui qui n'appartienne qu'à moi. »

languages.text: "Sadece ikimizin anlayabileceği bir şey. Müsaade ederseniz bu bir gizem olarak kalsın. Onunla ilgili sadece bana ait bir anım olmasını istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."

traits.locale_text: "Sadece ikimizin anlayabileceği bir şey. Müsaade ederseniz bu bir gizem olarak kalsın. Onunla ilgili sadece bana ait bir anım olmasını istiyorum."

languages.text: "Etwas, das nur wir beide verstehen würden. Erlaubt mir, dieses Geheimnis zu bewahren. Ich will eine Erinnerung an ihn haben, dir mir allein gehört."
languages.original_text: "Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."

traits.locale_text: "Etwas, das nur wir beide verstehen würden. Erlaubt mir, dieses Geheimnis zu bewahren. Ich will eine Erinnerung an ihn haben, dir mir allein gehört."

languages.text: 「我々二人だけにしか分からぬことです。どうか、この謎は解かぬままにしておかせてください。私だけのものである、彼の記憶を持っていたいのです」
languages.original_text: "Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."

traits.locale_text: 「我々二人だけにしか分からぬことです。どうか、この謎は解かぬままにしておかせてください。私だけのものである、彼の記憶を持っていたいのです」
